description: Personal notification plugin for Jellyfin with Overseerr/Jellyseerr, Sonarr, and Radarr integration.
name: JellyNotify
overview: JellyNotify adds per-user Jellyfin notifications with a bell, unread badge, notification panel, and toast alerts. It integrates with Overseerr/Jellyseerr, Sonarr, and Radarr while keeping user notifications isolated.
